prompt: Execute full Phase D for completed feature: realtime-notifications. Run D.1 progress update then D.2 spec archival in sequence.

assertions.name: executes_d1_then_d2
assertions.description: Should execute D.1 before D.2 in the correct sequence

assertions.name: d1_progress_completed
assertions.description: D.1 should complete with progress status update

assertions.name: d2_archival_completed
assertions.description: D.2 should complete with spec archived

assertions.name: phase_d_marked_complete
assertions.description: Phase D should be marked complete after both steps
